acquisition method: the direct effect of Rintatolimod was measured by targeted gene expression profiling and by proteomics measurements.
cleavage agent: Gold grade trypsin was used to fragment proteins into small peptides.
instrument: measured by nano-LC Orbitrap Fusion mass spectrometry (MS)
labeling: the direct effect of Rintatolimod was measured by targeted gene expression profiling and by proteomics measurements.
